en: So I called your room last night. I heard. I was thinking maybe we could go out sometime.
ja: 今度一緒に出かけない？
zhTW: 我在想也許我們可以找時間出去。
vi: Toi dang nghi hay la minh di choi mot hom nao do.

en: No, you're a dork. I'm in law school. Look, I'm not gonna go out with you. I can't believe you'd
ja: あなたとなんか出かけないわ。
vi: Toi se khong di choi voi anh dau.

en: even ask. Girls like me don't go out with losers like you. Let's get out of here. Excuse me.
ko: 나 같은 여자는 너 같은 루저랑 안 만나.
ja: 私みたいな女はあんたみたいな負け犬とは出かけないの。
zhTW: 像我這樣的女生不會跟你這種魯蛇出去。
vi: Con gai nhu toi khong di choi voi loser nhu anh dau.

en: Why didn't you call me? What? We spent a beautiful night together and then I never hear from you
ja: あんなに素敵な夜を過ごしたのに、その後連絡もなし？
zhTW: 我們共度了美好的一夜，然後你就再也沒聯絡我了？
vi: Chung ta da co mot dem tuyet voi, roi anh bien mat luon?

en: again? I... I'm sorry? Sorry for what? For breaking my heart or for giving me the greatest pleasure
ja: 私の心を壊したこと？それとも今まで最高の喜びをくれて
zhTW: 為了傷了我的心？還是給了我從未有過的快樂
vi: Vi lam toi dau long? Hay vi da cho toi niem hanh phuc lon nhat

en: I've ever known and then just taking it away? Uh, both? Well forget it. I've already spent too
ja: もういいわ。あなたのために泣いた時間が多すぎたの。
zhTW: 算了。我已經為你哭太多了。
vi: Thoi di. Toi da khoc vi anh qua nhieu roi.

en: many hours crying over you. So, when did you want to go out? Huh.
ja: で、いつ出かけたい？ふん。
zhTW: 那，你想什麼時候出去？哼。
vi: Vay, khi nao anh muon di choi? Huh.
